arts.ttl: Increased police presence arranged for Crystal Palace vs Millwall FA Cup derby
arts.sum: South London rivals have not met each other since January 2022

arts.ttl: Talking points from Crystal Palace 4 Aston Villa 1 - Eagles turn home fortunes ahead of South London FA Cup Millwall clash
arts.sum: Ahead of a South London grudge match at Selhurst Park tomorrow against Millwall, Eagles boss Oliver Glasner would have been hoping that Tuesday night’s clash at home to Aston Villa would have been the remedy to Palace’s poor home form during this 2024-25 campaign. Collecting the loose ball midway inside the Villa half with the game tied at 1-1, Wharton played an incisive ball into the path of Eze, who found Mateta to score beyond Olsen.

arts.ttl: 'It ripped Millwall apart' - remembering Matija Sarkic
arts.sum: Eight months after the goalkeeper's sudden death at the age of 26, Matija Sarkic's memory lives on at Millwall.

arts.ttl: Millwall defensive rock Japhet Tanganga promises to keep his cool against Crystal Palace
arts.sum: “It’s a good test for us to see our levels as well – to play against someone who is playing week in and week out in the Premier League,” said Tanganga. Asked about the prospects of the Lions upsetting their South London rivals, Tanganga said: “We have a very good chance.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace: Adam Wharton issues rallying cry for Millwall clash as Eagles eye FA Cup success
arts.sum: Eagles host London rivals at Selhurst Park this weekend looking to secure quarter-final berth

arts.ttl: 'I'm a football fan like everybody else' - Millwall boss Alex Neil on VAR and Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Millwall head coach Alex Neil says his players will not be impacted by the presence of VAR in Saturday's eagerly anticipated FA Cup showdown with local rivals Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace Want to Sign ‘Absolutely Phenomenal’ England Ace to Replace Guehi
arts.sum: Crystal Palace could opt to sign one of the Premier League's soon-to-be-relegated stars if he comes onto the market

arts.ttl: Former Man United chief Ed Woodward approached over board role with Crystal Palace owners Eagle Football Holdings - three years after his acrimonious Old Trafford departure
arts.sum: During Woodward's 17-year tenure, the club failed to win Premier League honours and fans criticised his emphasis on commerciality over the club's success on the pitch.

arts.ttl: 'On the ball, unbelievable': Marc Guehi says £22m talent wanted by Arsenal and Spurs is a 'really top player'
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur may not be evenly matched in the Premier League this season, but they are likely to be in direct competition in...

arts.ttl: EFL confirm Championship play-off dates as Leeds United set sights on title glory
arts.sum: Dates have been confirmed for this season's Championship play-offs as Leeds United look to avoid the end-of-season extravaganza. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community
